summary: Completed testing of multimodal vision-language AI feature for image-based complaint analysis. Backend API partially functional with critical file size validation issue. Frontend testing blocked by authentication requirements.

critical_bugs.issue: File size validation not working - accepts images larger than 5MB limit
critical_bugs.impact: Users can upload oversized images causing potential performance and storage issues

working_features.feature: Image analysis with Gemini Vision API
working_features.status: Working for JPEG, PNG, WEBP formats
Working - properly rejects BMP and other unsupported formats
Working - returns 400 for invalid image data

access_issues.issue: Cannot access complaint form due to authentication requirements
access_issues.impact: Unable to test image upload and form auto-fill functionality

untested_features.feature: Image upload with SELECT IMAGE button

passed_tests: Backend API accepts valid JPEG images and returns analysis
Backend API accepts valid PNG images and returns analysis
Backend API accepts valid WEBP images and returns analysis
Backend API rejects invalid image types (BMP) with 400 error
Backend API handles missing file parameter with 400/422 error
Backend API handles corrupted image data with 400 error
Gemini Vision API integration working - returns description, department, category, confidence
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix file size validation in backend API - images larger than 5MB are being accepted instead of rejected. Ensure proper authentication flow for frontend testing. The image analysis feature is implemented but has a critical security/performance issue with file size limits.

success_percentage.backend: 85% (6/7 tests passed - file size validation failed)
